header.title: XML Sitemap Generator — Build Sitemaps for Better Indexing
header.description: Free online XML sitemap generator to build sitemaps for search engines. Add URLs with custom priority, change frequency, and last-modified dates. Supports bulk URL import, image sitemaps, video sitemaps, and sitemap index files. Essential for helping Google discover and index all your important pages.
header.keywords: xml sitemap generator, sitemap generator, seo sitemap, website sitemap, google sitemap, sitemap.xml creator, bulk sitemap generator

bulkImport.title: Bulk Import
bulkImport.desc: Paste one URL or path per line. Relative paths will be prefixed with base URL.

sitemapIndex.info: A Sitemap Index file points to multiple sitemap files. Use this when you have more than 50,000 URLs or want to split sitemaps by category (products, blog, etc.).
sitemapIndex.title: Sitemap files

validation.title: Validation
validation.exceedLimit: Sitemap exceeds 50,000 URL limit per file
validation.urlMustStart: Row {row}: URL must start with http(s) — "{url}"
validation.urlCount: {count} URLs · Google recommends keeping files under 10 MB

implementation.description: These tags must be copied to the {head} of every page in the set — including all language versions. Each page must link to all others, including itself.

xmlHreflang.description: In the XML sitemap, each {url} block must contain all {xhtmlLink} alternates. Submit this sitemap in Google Search Console.

tips.title: Submission Tips
list: Upload sitemap.xml to your website root
Submit in Google Search Console > Sitemaps
Max 50,000 URLs or 50 MB per sitemap file

howToUse.title: How to Use Sitemap Generator
howToUse.step1Desc: Add your website URLs one by one or import them in bulk
howToUse.step2Desc: Configure priority, change frequency, and last-modified date for each URL
howToUse.step3Desc: Select between URL sitemap, sitemap index, or image sitemap formats
howToUse.step4Desc: Download the XML file and submit it to Google Search Console

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.sampleLabel: Sample URL to include in sitemap

items.question: What is an XML sitemap?
items.answer: An XML sitemap is a file that lists all important pages on your website, helping search engines discover and index your content more efficiently.

items.question: Do I need a sitemap?
items.answer: Sitemaps are especially useful for large websites, new sites with few backlinks, or sites with complex navigation. Small sites may not need one.

items.question: How often should I update my sitemap?
items.answer: Update your sitemap whenever you add or remove significant content. Most CMS platforms handle this automatically.

items.question: What is the maximum size for a sitemap?
items.answer: A sitemap can contain up to 50,000 URLs and must not exceed 50MB (uncompressed). For larger sites, split into multiple sitemap files.
